question: Will the Narrows be hikeable on 2026/05/29?
reason: The Narrows is typically accessible in late May, with water levels usually below 150 cfs, and favorable weather conditions expected.
evidence: In May, the Virgin River's flow rate often drops from spring runoff, making The Narrows accessible. ([fsguides.com](https://www.fsguides.com/visiting-zion-in-may?utm_source=openai))

The National Park Service advises checking current conditions before hiking, as high water and forecasted rainfall can affect trail accessibility. ([nps.gov](https://www.nps.gov/zion/planyourvisit/thenarrows.htm?utm_source=openai))
The weather forecast for May 29, 2026, in Springdale, UT, predicts sunny conditions with temperatures ranging from 51°F to 77°F, indicating minimal chance of rainfall.

question: Will the ICE deployment in Minnesota be substantially reduced by June 1, 2026?
reason: Operation Metro Surge concluded in February 2026, with a significant reduction in ICE agents in Minnesota by March 2026.
evidence: Operation Metro Surge ended in February 2026, with a residual force of 650 agents remaining in early March. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Operation_Metro_Surge?utm_source=openai))

By late February 2026, approximately 400 federal agents remained in Minnesota, with plans to withdraw by March. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/local/twin-cities/2026/02/26/court-filings-paint-mixed-picture-of-ices-minnesota-drawdown?utm_source=openai))
